title: Coelogyne kouytcheensis

The genus Coelogyne is a subgenus within the orchid family, and Coelogyne kouytcheensis is one of its species. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plant species.

intro: Coelogyne kouytcheensis, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its unique, fragrant blooms. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various conditions including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
